diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/CreatePick.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/CreatePick.Codeunit.al
index ab0d3640..e9141dc8 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/CreatePick.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Warehouse/Activity/CreatePick.Codeunit.al
@@ -160,6 +160,12 @@ codeunit 7312 "Create Pick"
                         end;
                         NewQtyToHandle :=
                           Round(RemTrackedQtyToPick / RemTrackedQtyToPickBase * TempWhseItemTrackingLine."Qty. to Handle (Base)", UnitOfMeasureManagement.QtyRndPrecision());
+                        
+                        // If the remaining quantity after this line would be less than the rounding precision,
+                        // assign the full remaining quantity to avoid leaving tiny unpickable quantities
+                        if Abs(RemTrackedQtyToPick - NewQtyToHandle) < UnitOfMeasureManagement.QtyRndPrecision() then
+                            NewQtyToHandle := RemTrackedQtyToPick;
+                        
                         if TempWhseItemTrackingLine."Qty. to Handle" <> NewQtyToHandle then begin
                             TempWhseItemTrackingLine."Qty. to Handle" := NewQtyToHandle;
                             OnBeforeTempWhseItemTrackingLineModify(TempWhseItemTrackingLine);
